summary: QR Code Terminal Login Feature (P1) - Complete testing of new QR pairing endpoints and UI. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified QR code generation in Settings > Connect Terminal tab and successful auto-pairing via /terminal?pair=TOKEN.

issues: Minor React console warning: span cannot be child of option/select in branch dropdowns (from dev tooling injection, not blocking)

TestQRPairTerminal.test_qr_pair_success: PASS - Returns status=paired, token, terminal_id, branch_id, branch_name

TestManualPairingStillWorks.test_manual_pair_endpoint: PASS - Manual pairing with code + branch works

TestActiveTerminals.test_list_active_terminals: PASS - Returns list of active terminals

settings_connect_terminal.qr_code_generation: PASS - QR code SVG generated with correct URL format
settings_connect_terminal.qr_expiry_display: PASS - Shows 'Expires in 10 minutes' for Branch 1
settings_connect_terminal.manual_branch_select: PASS - Branch dropdown for manual pairing visible
settings_connect_terminal.active_terminals_section: PASS - Shows list of paired terminals with Disconnect buttons

terminal_pair_screen.page_load: PASS - Terminal pair screen loads with data-testid='terminal-pair-screen'
terminal_pair_screen.instructions: PASS - 3-step instructions visible (Settings > Connect Terminal > Enter code)

terminal_qr_auto_pair.url_with_pair_token: PASS - /terminal?pair=TOKEN auto-pairs without showing code screen
terminal_qr_auto_pair.url_cleanup: PASS - ?pair= parameter removed from URL after pairing
terminal_qr_auto_pair.terminal_dashboard_load: PASS - Terminal POS loads with 'Data synced — 122 products loaded'
terminal_qr_auto_pair.branch_display: PASS - Shows 'Branch 1' in header after QR pairing

verified_features: Settings > Connect Terminal tab shows QR code generation section
Selecting a branch and clicking Generate QR shows a QR code
QR code shows branch name and expiry (10 minutes)
Backend POST /api/terminal/initiate-qr-pairing returns token, branch_name, expires_in
Backend POST /api/terminal/qr-pair accepts token and returns pairing data (status=paired)
Terminal page with ?pair=TOKEN auto-pairs without showing code screen
Manual pairing flow (6-digit code) still works alongside QR
QR code encodes correct URL format: {terminal_url}?pair={token}
Expired/invalid QR tokens return proper error messages
critical_code_review_comments: QR pairing implementation is clean with proper token expiry (10 minutes)
Terminal auto-pairs seamlessly when opened with ?pair= token
URL is cleaned after pairing (security best practice)
Both QR and manual pairing flows work independently
Active terminals list shows disconnect functionality
seed_data_creation: None - used existing branches and test user
context_for_next_testing_agent: QR Terminal Login feature fully tested. Key selectors: Settings page: data-testid='terminal-tab', data-testid='qr-branch-select', data-testid='generate-qr-btn', data-testid='terminal-url', data-testid='terminal-code-input', data-testid='terminal-branch-select', data-testid='pair-terminal-btn'. Terminal page: data-testid='terminal-pair-screen', data-testid='pairing-code'. QR pairing API: POST /api/terminal/initiate-qr-pairing (auth required), POST /api/terminal/qr-pair (no auth). QR tokens expire in 10 minutes and are single-use.
